translations.login.security-notice.description: Ukhiye wakho oyimfihlo uzogcinwa endaweni kudivayisi yakho. Ungalokothi wabelane ngakho nanoma ubani.

translations.desktopUpdater.dialog.noNotes: Lokhu kukhishwa akuzange kufake amanothi okukhishwa.
translations.desktopUpdater.dialog.linux.title: Ukufakwa mathupha kuyadingeka ekufakweni kwephakheji ye-Linux
translations.desktopUpdater.dialog.linux.description: Ukufaka okuzenzakalelayo kwangaphakathi nohlelo kusekelwa kuphela ukwakhiwa kwe-AppImage. Le khophi ye-Nostria ibonakala ifakiwe njengephakheji yesistimu, ngakho landa {$START_TAG_CODE}.deb{$CLOSE_TAG_CODE} ebuyekeziwe bese uyifake mathupha.
translations.desktopUpdater.dialog.linux.pathHint: Uma usebenzisa inkinobho yokukhipha ngezansi, isiphequluli sakho sinquma ukuthi ifayela lilondolozwe kuphi. Faka esikhundleni {$START_TAG_CODE}/path/to{$CLOSE_TAG_CODE} emyalweni wokufaka ngaleyo ndawo yangempela.

translations.articles.empty.public: Azikho iziqephu zendatshana ezishicilelwe okwamanje. Izindatshana zizovela lapha uma ababhali bezishicilela.

translations.home.test-dialog.title: I-Material Dialog Shell
translations.home.test-dialog.message: Le ngxoxo isebenzisa i-Angular Material ekuziphatheni kwembondela kanye nokufinyeleleka, kodwa isakhiwo nokuphathwa kweselula kubhalwe ukuthi kuzwakale njengengxenye yengxoxo yangokwezifiso ka-Nostria.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.mobile-descripti: Ezikrinini ezincane ibhokisi linweba ukusuka kolunye ukuya kolunye, lisuse amakhona ayindilinga, futhi ligcine umugqa wesenzo uhenjelwe phansi.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.style-descriptio: Unhlokweni, isikhala, amathoni angaphezulu, nokuphathwa kwezinkinobho kulandela ulimi lwengxoxo yangokwezifiso yohlelo lokusebenza esikhundleni sokubukeka kwesitoko.
translations.home.test-dialog.detail.material-descrip: Ukuphatha okugxilile, ukunqwabelanisa kwembondela, ukuphatha ukuphunyuka, nokusebenzisana okuseduze kusavela ku-Angular Material.

translations.music.liked.empty.message: Izingoma ozithandayo zizovela lapha. Qala ukuhlola futhi uthephe isithonjana senhliziyo ezingomeni ozithandayo!

translations.music.playlists.empty.following: Abantu obalandelayo abakakawakhi ama-albhamu. Shintshela esidlangalaleni ukuze uthole ama-albhamu kunethiwekhi ebanzi ye-Nostr.

translations.music.tracks.empty.title: Awekho amaculo atholakele
translations.music.tracks.empty.following: Abantu obalandelayo abakakabelani nganoma yimuphi umculo. Shintshela esidlangalaleni ukuze uthole umculo kunethiwekhi ebanzi ye-Nostr.

translations.notifications.search.label: Sesha
translations.notifications.settings.label: Izilungiselelo
translations.notifications.empty.system.title: Azikho izaziso zesistimu
translations.notifications.empty.system.description: Izaziso zobuchwepheshe nemilayezo yesistimu izovela lapha.
translations.notifications.empty.activity.title: Awukho umsebenzi okwamanje
translations.notifications.empty.activity.description: Uzobona okukhulunywe ngakho, okulandelayo, okuthunyelwe kabusha, nokunye ukusebenzelana lapha.
translations.notifications.empty.search.title: Azikho izaziso ezifanayo
translations.people.empty.list.title: Ayinalutho lapha...
translations.people.empty.list.subtitle: Ake sengeze abantu abamangalisayo!
translations.people.empty.none.title: Abekho abantu okwamanje
translations.people.empty.none.subtitle: Qala ngokwengeza abantu ofuna ukubalandela
translations.settings.about.title: Mayelana Ne-Nostria
translations.settings.about.more-info.description: Vakashela iwebhusayithi yethu ukuthola ulwazi olwengeziwe, amadokhumenti, nokusekela.
translations.settings.about.credits.title: Ukubonga Nokuqaphela
translations.settings.about.credits.description: Sithanda ukukhipha ukubonga kwethu okujulile kubatshalimali bethu abenze i-Nostria yenzeke:
translations.settings.about.credits.thanks: Siyabonga ngokukholelwa embonweni wethu wokwenza i-protocol ye-Nostr itholakale kubo bonke nokusekela ukuthuthukiswa kwenethiwekhi yomphakathi engagxilile ngempela.
translations.settings.event-expiration.title: Ukuphelelwa yisikhathi Komcimbi Womhlaba Wonke
translations.settings.event-expiration.toggle: Nika amandla Ukuphelelwa yisikhathi Kwembulunga yonke
translations.settings.event-expiration.description: Uma inikwe amandla, yonke imicimbi oyidalayo izofaka umaka wokuphelelwa yisikhathi (NIP-40). Ukudluliselwa kungase kususe imicimbi ephelelwe yisikhathi futhi amakhasimende kufanele azibe. Lokhu kuwusizo ekuhloleni noma uma ungafuni ukuthi okuqukethwe kuqhubeke.
translations.settings.event-expiration.warning: ⚠️ Isexwayiso: Ukuphelelwa yisikhathi akuqinisekisiwe. Imicimbi ingase igcinwe izinkampani zangaphandle ngaphambi kokuphelelwa yisikhathi. Ungasebenzisi lokhu njengesici sokuvikela sokuqukethwe okubucayi.
translations.settings.algorithm.subtitle: Phatha i-algorithimu yakho yokuncoma okuqukethwe kanye nezilinganiso zokuzibandakanya komsebenzisi
translations.settings.algorithm.privacy.description: Zonke lezi zilinganiso zisedivayisini yakho futhi azihlanganyeli namuntu.
translations.settings.algorithm.stats.title: Izibalo Ze-Algorithimu
translations.settings.algorithm.stats.subtitle: Ukubuka konke kwezilinganiso zakho zokuzibandakanya
translations.settings.algorithm.metrics.title: Izilinganiso Zabasebenzisi
translations.settings.algorithm.metrics.subtitle: Buka futhi uphathe idatha yokuzibandakanya komsebenzisi
translations.settings.algorithm.favorites.empty.title: Azikho izintandokazi okwamanje
translations.settings.algorithm.favorites.empty.descr: Engeza abasebenzisi ezintandokazini zakho ukuze uqinisekise ukuthi zihlala zivela phezulu kokuphakelayo kwakho.
translations.settings.algorithm.actions.title: Izenzo
translations.settings.feed.behavior.title: Ukuziphatha kokuphakelayo
translations.settings.navigation.start-feeds-last-eve: Bonisa izenzakalo ezilayishwe ngaphambilini kuqala uma uvula izifunza, nezithangiso ezintsha ezivela ngenkinobho. Kuvimbela isifunza ukuthi sigxumele ezenzakalweni zamuva uma kulayisha kabusha.
translations.settings.feed.featured-cards.description: Bonisa amakhadi okuncoma afakiwe nawokuphromotha phakathi kokuthunyelwe okuphakelayo.
translations.settings.navigation.show-thread-lines.de: Bonisa imigqa eqondile ohlangothini lwesobunxele lwezimpendulo ezinentambo ukukhombisa ukujula kwesidleke.
translations.settings.navigation.open-threads-expande: Uma ubuka uchungechunge, bonisa zonke izimpendulo ezinwetshwe ngokuzenzakalela. Khubaza ukubuka okuhlanzekile kokuqala ngezimpendulo ezigoqiwe.
translations.settings.max-relays.title: Ama-relay amaningi ngomsebenzisi
translations.settings.relay-mode.title: Imodi yokudlulisa
translations.settings.relay-mode.description: Khetha ukuthi ama-relay akhethwa kanjani uma ubuza imicimbi yabanye abasebenzisi.
translations.settings.relay-mode.label: Imodi yokudlulisa
translations.settings.relay-mode.hybrid.description: I-Hybrid ihlanganisa ukudluliselwa komsebenzisi okutholiwe nokudluliswa kwe-akhawunti yakho yamanje ukuze kutholakale umcimbi othuthukisiwe.
translations.settings.relay-mode.outbox.description: Ibhokisi lokuphumayo libuza kuphela ukudluliselwa okutholwe kumsebenzisi oqondiwe (uhlobo 10002 noma uhlobo 3).
translations.settings.auto-relay-auth.title: Ukufakazela ubuqiniso kwe-Relay
translations.settings.auto-relay-auth.description: Qinisekisa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokudlulisela okudinga ukuqinisekiswa. Uma kukhutshaziwe, ukudluliselwa okudinga ukuqinisekiswa ngeke kusetshenziswe.
translations.settings.client-tags.title: Amathegi Weklayenti
translations.settings.client-tags.add.description: Engeza ithegi leklayenti ye-Nostria ezenzakalweni ozishicilelayo
translations.settings.media.title: Imidiya
translations.settings.media.description: Lawula indlela okuqukethwe yimidiya okuboniswa ngayo ngokusekelwe esimweni sakho sokulandela
translations.settings.media.auto-play-all.description: Uma kunikwe amandla, wonke amavidiyo azodlala ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho evela ekuphakeleni. Amavidiyo amafushane (amasekhondi angu-15 noma ngaphansi) nawo azozihambela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
translations.settings.music-status.description: Uma inikwe amandla, ingoma yakho edlalwayo manje yabiwa njengesimo somsebenzisi ukuze abanye babone ukuthi yini oyilalelayo.
translations.settings.calendar.title: Uhlelo Lwekhalenda
translations.settings.calendar.description: Khetha isistimu yekhalenda oyincamelayo yamadethi okubonisa
translations.settings.calendar.label: Ikhalenda
translations.settings.calendar.gregorian.description: Ikhalenda elijwayelekile le-civil elisetshenziswa emhlabeni wonke elinezinyanga eziyi-12 zobude obuhlukahlukene.
translations.settings.calendar.chronia.description: Ikhalenda lesimanje elenziwe lula elinezinyanga eziyi-13 zezinsuku ezingama-28 lilinye, kanye noSuku lweSolstice. Unyaka we-0 uqala ngoDisemba 22, 2015.
translations.settings.calendar.ethiopian.description: Ikhalenda lendabuko lase-Ethiopia elinezinyanga ezingu-13: izinyanga ezingu-12 izinsuku ezingu-30 kanye ne-Pagume (izinsuku ezingu-5-6). Cishe iminyaka engu-7-8 ngemuva kukaGregorian.
translations.settings.time-format.label: Ifomethi Yesikhathi
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.title: Isihlungi Sogaxekile Sesaziso
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.descri: Hlunga izaziso ezenzakalweni ezimaka ama-akhawunti amaningi kakhulu. Abathumela ogaxekile bavame ukumaka abasebenzisi abaningi ukuze bathole ukunakwa.
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.label: Umkhawulo wama-akhawunti amakiwe
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.none.d: Zonke izaziso zizoboniswa kungakhathaliseki ukuthi mangaki ama-akhawunti amakiwe kumcimbi.
translations.settings.notification-spam-filter.active: Imicimbi emaka ngaphezu kwama-akhawunti angu-{$INTERPOLATION} ngeke ikhiqize izaziso.
translations.settings.logging.debug.description: Ibonisa yonke imiyalezo yokungena kuhlanganise ulwazi oluningiliziwe lokulungisa.
translations.settings.external-links.title: Izixhumanisi Zangaphandle
translations.settings.external-links.description: Lungiselela ukuthi yiziphi izizinda zangaphandle okufanele zivuleke ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza esikhundleni sethebhu entsha yesiphequluli
translations.settings.title: Izilungiselelo
translations.settings.display.title: Isibonisi
translations.settings.display.lock-screen-rotation.de: Gcina uhlelo lokusebenza kumodi yokuma ngobude ukuze lingaphenduki lapho idivayisi yakho izungeza. Isebenza kuphela kumadivayisi neziphequluli ezisekela ukukhiya umumo.
translations.settings.reactions.title: Ukusabela
translations.settings.reactions.default-emoji.descrip: Khetha i-emoji ethunyelwe uma uthepha kanye inkinobho yokusabela. Ukucindezela isikhathi eside kuvula isikhi se-emoji esigcwele.
translations.settings.action-buttons.title: Izinkinobho Zesenzo
translations.settings.action-buttons.description: Khetha ukuthi izinkinobho zesenzo (Thanda, Phendula, Yabelana, njll.) ziboniswa kanjani ngezansi kokuthunyelwe nezimpendulo. Ungakwazi futhi ukuchofoza kwesokudla noma ucindezele isikhathi eside inkinobho yokunweba kunoma yikuphi okuthunyelwe ukuze ujikeleze kumamodi.
translations.settings.navigation.title: Ukuzulazula
translations.settings.navigation.start-last-page.desc: Uma uvula uhlelo lokusebenza, buyisela ikhasi lokugcina owawulibuka.
translations.settings.layout.right-sidebar.descriptio: Bonisa ibha eseceleni yedeskithophu enezintandokazi kanye ne-Runes. Lokhu kuvumelaniswa nezilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho kuwo wonke amadivayisi.
translations.settings.privacy.analytics.title: Izibalo
translations.settings.privacy.analytics.description: I-Analytics iwukungena ngokuqinile futhi isebenza kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti akulolu hlelo lokusebenza kule divayisi. Uma uyinika amandla, amalogi ezibalo nedatha yokuxilonga izolayishwa kumhlinzeki wamafu ukusiza onjiniyela bathuthukise ikhwalithi nokuthembeka.
translations.settings.logs.title: Amalogi nokuhlela
translations.settings.logs.description: Izibalo zokudlulisa, konke ukudluliselwa, nokuhlaziywa kweqoqo lokuxazulula inkinga.
translations.settings.debug.description: Ukulingisa kwenkundla namathuluzi okuhlola ukugeleza kwenkokhelo egxile kunjiniyela.
translations.settings.logs.relay-stats.title: Izibalo ze-Relay
translations.settings.privacy.url.title: Ubumfihlo Be-URL
translations.settings.privacy.image-cache.title: Isevisi Yesitoreji Sesithombe
translations.settings.privacy.social-sharing.title: Izinketho Zokwabelana Komphakathi
translations.settings.privacy.social-sharing.enable: Nika amandla ukubuka kuqala kokwabelana komphakathi
translations.settings.privacy.reported.title: Izilungiselelo Zokuqukethwe Okubikiwe
translations.settings.privacy.reported.description: Khetha izinhlobo zokuqukethwe okubikiwe ezizofihliwe ngokuzenzakalelayo. Uma okuqukethwe kufihlwe, usengakhetha ukukwembula.
translations.settings.privacy.blocked.title: Ama-Akhawunti Avinjiwe
translations.settings.privacy.muted-words.title: Amagama Athulisiwe
translations.settings.privacy.muted-words.empty: Awukanawo amagama athulisiwe. Engeza amagama ngenhla ukuqala ukuhlunga okuqukethwe.
translations.settings.privacy.muted-tags.title: Izinhlobo Izigameko Ezithulisiwe
translations.settings.privacy.muted-threads.title: Izingxoxo Ezithulisiwe
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.title: Susa okuqukethwe kwami
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.delete-e: Khetha umcimbi futhi ubuyekeze ukugeleza kokususa.
translations.settings.privacy.remove-content.delete-a: Vula isikrini sokususa idatha ye-akhawunti futhi ubuyekeze izinketho ezitholakalayo.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.title: Ukususwa kwepharamitha yokulandela i-URL
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p1: Uma inikwe amandla, imingcele yokulandelela ikhishwa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuma-URL owanamathiselayo.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p2: Lokhu kususa amapharamitha afana ne-utm_*, fbclid, gclid, namanye amakhodi okulandelela asetshenziswa i-YouTube, Twitter/X, Facebook, nezinye izinkundla ukulandelela umsebenzi wakho kuwebhu yonkana.
translations.settings.privacy.info.tracking.p3: Khubaza uma udinga ukulondoloza zonke izinhlaka ze-URL, nakuba lokhu kungase kunciphise ubumfihlo bakho.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.title: Isevisi Yenqolobane Yesithombe
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p1: Uma inikwe amandla, izithombe zephrofayela nezinye izithombe ziyalungiswa futhi zifakwe kunqolobane kusetshenziswa i-Angular Service Worker ukuze uthole izikhathi ezithuthukisiwe zokulayisha nokutholakala ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p2: Izithombe zifakwe kunqolobane kuze kube yizinsuku ezingu-7 futhi ziphathwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Lokhu kunciphisa ukusetshenziswa komkhawulokudonsa futhi kuthuthukisa ukusebenza, ikakhulukazi ekuxhumekeni okuhamba kancane.
translations.settings.privacy.info.image-cache.p3: Khubaza uma ufuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi izithombe zihlala zilayishwa ngokuqondile emthonjeni, okuzokhuphula ukusetshenziswa komkhawulokudonsa nezikhathi zokulayisha.
translations.settings.privacy.info.social.title: Ukubuka kuqala Ukwabelana Komphakathi
translations.settings.privacy.info.social.description: Uma kunikwe amandla, ukuhlola kuqala okuqukethwe kuzoboniswa kuzixhumanisi zangaphandle ezabiwe kokuthunyelwe.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p1: Uma inikwe amandla, ama-favicons (izithonjana zewebhusayithi ezincane) zilandwa kusetshenziswa isevisi ye-favicon ye-Google, ehlinzeka ngezithonjana ezithembekile kumawebhusayithi amaningi.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p2: Inothi lobumfihlo: Lokhu kuthumela amagama esizinda owavakashelayo eziphakelini ze-Google. I-Google ingase ifake lezi zicelo futhi izihlobanise nekheli lakho le-IP.
translations.settings.privacy.info.google-favicon.p3: Uma kukhutshaziwe (okuzenzakalelayo), ama-favicons alandwa ngokuqondile kuseva yewebhusayithi ngayinye, eyimfihlo kakhulu kodwa engase yehluleke kwamanye amasayithi angenalo ifayela elijwayelekile le-favicon.ico.
translations.settings.privacy.title: Izilungiselelo Zobumfihlo Nokuphepha
translations.settings.profile.edit.description: Buyekeza igama lakho, isithombe, umlando wakho, nezixhumanisi zephrofayela
translations.settings.relays.title: Phatha Ama-Relay
translations.settings.relays.account-relays.descripti: Phatha ukuxhumana kwakho komuntu siqu kwe-relay
translations.settings.search.relays.description: Lungiselela ukuthi iyiphi i-relay ezosetshenziselwa ukusesha
translations.settings.media-servers.title: Amaseva Emidiya
translations.settings.media-servers.description: Phatha ukulayisha kwakho kanye neziphakeli zemidiya ezibuyela emuva
translations.settings.relays.no-relays.title: Awekho Ama-Relay E-Akhawunti Alungisiwe
translations.settings.relays.no-relays.description: Awukabi nama-relay alungisiwe. Ama-relay abalulekile ukuze usebenzise i-Nostr.
translations.settings.relays.manual-add: Noma engeza i-relay ngokuzenzela usebenzisa ibhokisi elingezansi
translations.settings.relays.malformed.title: Ukumiswa Kwe-Relay Okungalungile Kutholakele
translations.settings.relays.malformed.description: Uhlu lwakho lwama-relay (uhlobo 10002) lwenziwa iklayenti ye-Nostr enye enamagama amathegi angalungile. Isenzakalo sisebenzisa amathegi e-'relay' esikhundleni samathegi afanele e-'r' ngokwe-protocol ye-Nostr.
translations.settings.relays.malformed.action: Lokhu kungavimbela amanye amaklayenti e-Nostr ukuthi alayishe kahle uhlu lwakho lwama-relay. Chofoza inkinobho engezansi ukuze ulungise ngokuzenzakalelayo futhi ushicilele kabusha uhlu lwakho lwama-relay ngefomathi efanele.
translations.settings.relays.malformed.button: Lungisa Futhi Ushicilele Kabusha Uhlu Lwama-Relay
translations.settings.relays.no-message-relays: Akukho ukudluliselwa komlayezo okulungisiwe. Vumelanisa ne-akhawunti yakho edluliswayo noma wengeze ngokwakho.
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.title: Isexwayiso Sokudala
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.description: Uhlu lwakho lokulandela luqukethe uhlu lwama-relay. Lokhu sekudala ku-protocol.
translations.settings.relays.deprecated.migrate-hint: Uma unemicimbi yomlando kulokhu kudluliselwa okudala, ungakwazi ukuthutha ku-akhawunti yakho edluliselwe manje ukuze uqinisekise ukuthi idatha yakho ayilahleki.
translations.settings.relays.discovery.subtitle: Ama-relay okutholwa asetshenziswa ukuthola abasebenzisi abasha nabalandelayo babo.
translations.settings.relays.discovery.empty.title: Awunawo ama-relay okutholayo amisiwe.
translations.settings.relays.discovery.empty.descript: Engeza ukudluliselwa kokutholwa usebenzisa okokufaka ngenhla.
translations.settings.relays.observed.empty.title: Awukanawo Ama-Relay Abanjiwe
translations.settings.relays.observed.empty.descripti: Njengoba usebenzisa i-Nostria, ama-relay adluliswayo kuzigameko azoqoqwa lapha. Lokhu kukusiza ukuhlola i-network nokulawula izixhumanisi.
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.title: Ulwazi lokudlulisa (NIP-11)
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.name: Igama:
translations.settings.relays.observed.nip11.unavailab: Ayikwazi ukulanda ulwazi lokudlulisela. I-relay ingase ingasekeli i-NIP-11.
translations.settings.relays.info.title: Indlela Ama-Relay Akho Asebenza Ngayo
translations.settings.relays.info.p1: I-Akhawunti Edluliselwe isetshenziselwa ukushicilela iphrofayela yakho nemicimbi ukuze abanye bayithole.
translations.settings.relays.info.p2: I-Akhawunti Edluliselwe Ikhaya lakho. Yilapho idatha yakho igcinwa khona futhi iphikelela. Kulapho abanye abasebenzisi bebuyisa khona imicimbi yakho. Qiniseka ukuthi ukhetha ukudluliselwa oyethembayo futhi othembekile.
translations.settings.relays.info.p3: Ngokujwayelekile akufanele udinge ama-relay angaphezu kwamane. Awudingi ukukhetha ama-relay adume kakhulu, abanye abasebenzisi basazokuthola ngenxa ye-Discovery Relays.
translations.settings.relays.info.p4: Uma ulondoloza i-Akhawunti Edluliselwe, Uhlu lwakho Lokudlulisa luphinde lushicilelwe ku-Discovery Relays ukusiza abanye ukuthi bakuthole.
translations.settings.relays.info.p5: Ukudluliselwa kokuqala ohlwini kuzosetshenziswa njengeseluleko sokudlulisela lapho wabelana ngezindatshana noma amanothi aku-akhawunti yakho. Hudula ama-relay ukuze uwahlele kabusha.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.title: Indlela I-Discovery Relays isebenza ngayo
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p1: I-Discovery Relays isetshenziselwa ukuthola ukuthi yikuphi ukudluliselwa kwabanye abasebenzisi be-Nostr abakhethayo. I-Nostria izozama ukubuyisa uhlu lwe-User Relay (uhlobo:imicimbi ye-10002) kusuka kulokhu kudluliselwa, hhayi iphrofayili noma eminye imicimbi.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p2: Ngemuva kokuthi kutholwe ukudluliselwa okuncanyelwayo komsebenzisi, i-Nostria ixhuma kuma-relay akhethwayo umsebenzisi ukuze abuyise iphrofayela, okuthunyelwe, neminye imicimbi.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p3: Akufanele ngokuvamile udinge okungaphezu kokukodwa noma okubili kokutholwayo okudluliselwe.
translations.settings.relays.discovery-info.p4: Uma ulondoloza ama-Relay akho, aphinde ashicilelwe kulokhu kudluliswa kwe-Discovery ukusiza abanye bakuthole.
translations.settings.search.subtitle: Lezi zindlela zokudlulisela zisetshenziswa uma kwenziwa imibuzo yosesho (NIP-50)
translations.settings.search.empty.title: Awunawo ama-relay okusesha amisiwe.
translations.settings.search.empty.description: Engeza i-relay yosesho usebenzisa okokufaka okungenhla ukuze unike amandla ukusebenza kokusesha.
translations.settings.search.tooltip.p1: I-Search relays isekela i-NIP-50 (Ikhono Lokusesha) futhi isetshenziselwa ukwenza ukusesha okusekelwe emibhalweni kukho konke okuqukethwe kwe-Nostr.
translations.settings.search.tooltip.p2: Uhlu lwakho lwe-relay yosesho lugcinwa njengomcimbi wohlobo lwe-10007 futhi luvumelaniswa kuwo wonke amaklayenti akho e-Nostr.
translations.settings.search.title: Izilungiselelo Zosesho
translations.settings.display.font.description: Khetha ifonti oyincamelayo yohlelo lokusebenza. I-Roboto isebenza kangcono ngezingxenye ze-Angular Material.
translations.settings.home-destination.title: Indawo Yenkinobho Yasekhaya
translations.settings.home-destination.description: Khetha ukuthi inkinobho yelogo ye-Nostria kufanele izulele kuphi.
translations.settings.home-destination.first-menu-ite: Zulazulela entweni yokuqala kumenyu yakho oyifisayo
translations.settings.menu.description: Hudula izinto ukuze uhlele kabusha. Hambisa izinto phakathi kwezinhlu ukuze uzibonise noma uzifihle.
translations.settings.menu.empty-active: Azikho izinto kumenyu. Engeza izinto ezisuka ngezansi.
translations.settings.post-to-x.title: Thumela ku-X
translations.settings.post-to-x.description: Xhuma i-akhawunti yakho ye-X ukuze ushicilele umbhalo wokuthunyelwe kwakho kwe-Nostria ku-X.
translations.settings.post-to-x.premium-only: Okuthunyelwe ku-X kutholakala kuma-akhawunti e-Premium+ kuphela.
translations.settings.post-to-x.upgrade: Thuthukela ku-Premium+ ukuze uxhume noma ushicilele ku-X usuka e-Nostria.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connected.description: Okuthunyelwe kwakho kwe-Nostria manje nakho kungashicilela kule akhawunti ye-X.
translations.settings.post-to-x.note: Xhuma kabusha uma ufuna ukushintshela kwenye i-akhawunti ye-X. Ukusekelwa kwemidiya kufaka phakathi izithombe ezifika kwezi-4 noma ividiyo/i-GIF engu-1 ngokuthunyelwe ngakunye. Ukucutshungulwa kwekhwothi/impendulo kanye nokuhlelwa kokuthunyelwe akukafaneliselwa ku-X okwamanje.
translations.settings.post-to-x.default-description: Uma kunikwe amandla, okuthunyelwe okusha kuzoqala ngenketho ethi X Thumela kuya ku-X evuliwe kokuthi Izinketho Ezithuthukile.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connect.description: I-akhawunti ye-X eyodwa kuphela esekelwa i-akhawunti ye-Nostria ngayinye. Uma uxhume engalungile ngaphambilini, yinqamule bese uxhuma futhi nge-akhawunti engu-X efanele.
translations.settings.post-to-x.connect.authorization: Uzoqondiswa kabusha ku-X ukuze ugunyaze uNostria. I-backend igcina amathokheni akho okufinyelela e-X futhi iwasebenzisa kuphela uma ukhetha ukuthumela ku-X.
translations.settings.sounds.title: Imisindo
translations.settings.sounds.description: Khetha ukuthi yimiphi imisindo yangaphakathi nohlelo okufanele idlalwa nguNostria.
translations.settings.sounds.ui-interaction.descripti: Dlala imisindo yempendulo ecashile yokuthandwa nezinye izenzo eziqondile ze-UI.
translations.settings.sounds.message-notifications.de: Dlala umsindo omfushane uma umlayezo oqondile omusha ongafundiwe ufika.
translations.settings.sounds.zaps.description: Dlala imisindo yokugubha lapho kungena ama-zaps.
translations.settings.display.text-size.description: Lungisa usayizi wombhalo ukuze ufundeke kangcono. Lesi silungiselelo sisebenza kanye nezilungiselelo zosayizi wombhalo wedivayisi yakho.
translations.settings.trust.description: Nika amandla izici ze-Web of Trust usebenzisa ama-assertion athembekile e-NIP-85. Lokhu kukuvumela ukuthi ubone izilinganiso zedumela nezibalo zabasebenzisi ezibalwe abahlinzeki bezinsizakalo abathembekile.
translations.settings.trust.services.title: Amasevisi Wokuthola Amaphuzu
translations.settings.trust.services.description: Lezi zinsizakalo zihlaziya inethiwekhi ye-Nostr futhi zibale izikolo zesithunzi sama-akhawunti.
translations.settings.trust.providers.migrationText: I-akhawunti yakho isebenzisa ukulungiselelwa kwangaphambilini komhlinzeki we-Brainstorm trust. Chofoza okuthi Yenza kusebenze ukuze uthuthele ekusetheni i-Brainstorm entsha.
translations.settings.trust.providers.migrationWarnin: Isexwayiso: lokhu kuzongena esikhundleni sokucushwa kwakho kwamanje komhlinzeki wesevisi ngohlobo 10040.
translations.settings.trust.personalized.title: Amaphuzu Aqondene nawe
translations.settings.trust.precache.title: Inqolobane yangaphambilini Ngokulandela Izikolo Zezinga
translations.settings.trust.precache.description: Layisha kabusha izikolo zezinga zawo wonke ama-akhawunti alandelwe manje ukuze hambisa phezulu amakhadi namaphrofayela avuleke ngokushesha.
translations.settings.trust.precache.button: Layisha kabusha Zonke Izikolo Ezilandelayo Zezinga
translations.settings.trust.precache.loadingFollowing: Ilayisha uhlu lwakho olulandelayo ngaphambi kokuthi izinga lenani liqale ukulondoloza isikhashana.
translations.settings.trust.precache.emptyFollowing: Landela okungenani i-akhawunti eyodwa ukuze ugcine inqolobane yezinga lezikolo ze-Web of Trust.
translations.settings.trust.precache.done: Iqedele ukuqopha ngaphambilini amaphuzu wezinga lama-akhawunti alandelwe angu-{$INTERPOLATION}.
translations.settings.trust.personalized.no10040: Awukho umcimbi we-10040 olayishwe le akhawunti okwamanje.
translations.settings.trust.title: Ukwethemba
translations.settings.trust.brainstorm.configFromApi: Amathegi omhlinzeki we-Brainstorm alungiselelwe kusukela ku-API.
translations.settings.trust.brainstorm.errorGeneric: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle ngesikhathi sikhuluma no-Brainstorm.
translations.streams.dialog.introTitle: Shicilela ukusakaza kwakho bukhoma okuvela e-Nostria
translations.streams.dialog.introDescription: Ungaphusha ikhamera nemakrofoni ngokuqondile ku-OpenResist ukusuka kusiphequluli, uqinisekise okuphakelayo ngasese, bese ushicilela umcimbi wokusakaza bukhoma we-Nostr uma usulungile.
translations.streams.dialog.introDetails: Uma umhlinzeki wakho ekunika kuphela ikhasi lokubuka lomphakathi, uNostria usengakwazi ukushicilela umcimbi wokusakaza bukhoma futhi axhumanise ababukeli lapho. Engeza i-HLS eqondile noma i-URL yokudlala ye-LiveKit kuphela uma ufuna ukudlalwa okusemgqeni ngaphakathi kwe-Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.signInRequired: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ushicilele ukusakaza bukhoma okuvela e-Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.broadcastDescription: Qala ukusakaza okuyimfihlo kwe-WHIP kuqala. Akukho okushicilelwe ku-Nostr uze uchofoze inkinobho yokumemezela.
translations.streams.dialog.previewPlaceholder: Lungiselela ikhamera ukuze uhlole kuqala ukusakaza kwakho lapha.
translations.streams.dialog.privateModeHint: Imodi eyimfihlo iwusizo ekuhloleni uzimele, izimvume, kanye nekhasi lokubuka lomhlinzeki ngaphambi kokuthi umemezele.
translations.streams.dialog.watchPageHint: Ikhasi lokubuka lomhlinzeki lisetshenziswa njengesixhumanisi esisesidlangalaleni uma ingekho i-URL yokudlala ekulayini etholakalayo.
translations.streams.dialog.summaryPlaceholder: Okusakazayo, ubani ojoyinayo, nalapho abantu abangakubuka khona.
translations.streams.dialog.identifierHint: Phinda usebenzise lesi sihlonzi uma ufuna ukubuyekeza okuthunyelwe bukhoma okufanayo.
translations.streams.dialog.playbackHint: Uma uthanda. Engeza i-HLS (.m3u8) noma i-URL yokudlala ye-LiveKit uma ufuna ukudlalwa okusemgqeni e-Nostria.
translations.streams.dialog.stopBeforeSwitch: Misa ukusakaza okusebenzayo ngaphambi kokushintsha abahlinzeki.
translations.streams.dialog.privateStarted: Ukusakaza okuyimfihlo kubukhoma. Shicilela umcimbi we-Nostr uma usulungile.
translations.streams.dialog.signInFirst: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ushicilele ukusakaza bukhoma.
translations.streams.dialog.titleRequired: Sicela wengeze isihloko sokusakaza kwakho bukhoma.
translations.streams.dialog.playbackOrPlatformRequire: Engeza i-URL yokudlala noma ikhasi lokubuka lomhlinzeki ngaphambi kokumemezela ukusakaza bukhoma.
translations.streams.dialog.publishSuccessWithBroadca: Ukusakaza bukhoma kumenyezelwe. Ukusakaza kwekhamera yakho kuhlala bukhoma uze ukumise kokuthi Qala Ukusakaza Bukhoma.
translations.streams.dialog.publishFailed: Yehlulekile ukushicilela ukusakaza bukhoma. Sicela uzame futhi.
translations.streams.empty.title: Akukho ukusakaza okutholakele
translations.streams.empty.live: Akukho ukusakaza bukhoma okwamanje. Hlola kamuva noma uhlole ukusakaza okuhleliwe.
translations.streams.empty.scheduled: Akukho ukusakaza okuhleliwe. Hlola kamuva izigameko ezizayo.
translations.wallet.add.description: Xhuma isikhwama sakho semali usebenzisa i-Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC). Namathisela uchungechunge lwakho lokuxhumana ngezansi.
translations.wallet.connection-string.hint: Namathisela iyunithi yezinhlamvu yakho yokuxhuma ye-Nostr Wallet Connect lapha
translations.wallet.error.pattern: Ifomethi yeyunithi yezinhlamvu yokuxhuma engavumelekile. Kumelwe kuqale ngokuthi nostr+walletconnect:// noma web+nostr+walletconnect://
translations.wallet.transfer.title: Dlulisa Phakathi Kwezikhwama
translations.wallet.transfer.subtitle: Ukuhambisa izihlalo kusuka esikhwameni esisodwa esixhunyiwe kuya kwesinye
translations.wallet.donation.title: Sekela Nostria Development
translations.wallet.donation.subtitle: Sisize siqhubeke sakhe ikusasa likaNostr
translations.wallet.bitcoin-donation.title: Umnikelo we-Bitcoin on-chain
translations.wallet.bitcoin-donation.subtitle: Sekela ukuthuthukiswa kwe-Nostria ngomnikelo we-Bitcoin we-on-chain
translations.wallet.nwc-providers.title: Abahlinzeki be-Nostr Wallet Connect
translations.wallet.nwc-providers.subtitle: Thola isikhwama semali esisekela i-Nostr Wallet Connect ozoyisebenzisa ne-Nostria
translations.wallet.empty.title: Awekho Amawalethi Axhunyiwe
translations.wallet.empty.description: Xhuma isikhwama sakho semali sokuqala ukuze uqale ukuthumela nokwamukela izinkokhelo.
translations.wallet.transactions.empty.title: Akukho Okwenziwayo Okwamanje
translations.wallet.transactions.empty.description: Umlando wakho wokwenziwe uzovela lapha uma usuqale ukuthumela noma ukwamukela izinkokhelo.
translations.wallet.transactions.no-wallet.title: Ayikho I-Wallet Exhunyiwe
translations.wallet.transactions.no-wallet.descriptio: Xhuma isikhwama semali ukuze ubuke umlando wakho wokwenziwe.
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.title: Fihla Amanani Wallet
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.subtitle: Fihla inani lama-sats esikhwameni sakho ukuze uthole ubumfihlo.
translations.wallet.settings.hide-amounts.info: Uma kunikwe amandla, amanani ahleli kusikhwama sakho semali azofihlwa futhi esikhundleni sawo kufakwe ama-asterisk (****). Lokhu kunikeza ubumfihlo uma ubuka isikhwama sakho semali kuzikrini ezabiwe noma zomphakathi.
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.title: Inkinobho ye-Zap esheshayo
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.subtitle: Nika amandla inkinobho ehlukile ye-zap esheshayo ethumela inani elimisiwe ngokushesha ngokuchofoza okukodwa.
translations.wallet.settings.quick-zap.info: Uma inikwe amandla, inkinobho ye-zap esheshayo ivela eduze kwenkinobho ye-zap evamile. Ukuyichofoza ngokushesha kuthumela inani elimisiwe ngaphandle kokuvula noma iyiphi ingxoxo.
translations.wallet.add.title: Engeza i-Wallet
translations.androidUpdater.androidOnly: Izibuyekezo ze-APK zitholakala kuphela ohlelweni lokusebenza olufakiwe lwe-Android.
translations.androidUpdater.downloadFailed: Ayikwazi ukuvula ukulanda kwe-Android APK khona manje.
translations.desktopUpdater.desktopOnly: Izibuyekezo ezizenzakalelayo zitholakala kuphela kuhlelo lokusebenza lwedeskithophu.
translations.desktopUpdater.dialog.title: Isibuyekezo siyatholakala
translations.desktopUpdater.installed: Isibuyekezo sifakiwe. Qala kabusha i-Nostria ukuze uqedele ukusebenzisa isibuyekezo uma singaqalisi kabusha ngokuzenzakalelayo.
translations.create.message.dialog.title: Qala Ingxoxo Entsha
translations.streams.dialog.signInToStart: Ngena ngemvume ukuze uqale ukusakaza bukhoma.
translations.media.creator.dialog.title: Thumela imidiya
translations.settings.wallet.overview.description: Vula isikhwama sakho semali, okwenziwayo, ama-zaps, nezilungiselelo ze-wallet
translations.settings.wallet.premium.description: Phatha uhlelo lwakho lwe-Nostria premium kanye nesimo sokubhaliselwe
